discrepancies.summary: 124 prompt body §1 cites 'plan.md:3231' as the Q22 outstanding-decision substrate, but 099 (2026-05-07) had already discharged the arbitration before slate 120-124 was drafted (2026-05-09 ~11:25 JST). plan.md was apparently not updated to reflect 099's completion before slate 120-124 was drafted, or plan.md:3231 still listed Q22 as outstanding because operator ratification was pending. Either way, slate-drafting did not perform the Phase 0 supersession audit at draft time.
discrepancies.resolution: Halt 124 substantive fire per Phase 0 STEP 0.2; deposit supersession memo; recommend that future slate drafting add a draft-time supersession check (not just fire-time).
